marketing.heroTitle: Reliable service from one accountable operator.
marketing.heroSubtitle: Independent operator. Straight answers. No upsell scripts.
marketing.tagline: If it breaks, we make it work.
marketing.metaTitle: Mainline Services | Local Field Service & Repairs
marketing.metaDescription: Technician owned and operated — honest service, no corporate overhead. Text or call for fast, reliable field service and repairs.
marketing.callToActionTitle: Ready to get it fixed the right way?

sms.optInIntro: Thanks for reaching out to {companyName}. Tell us what service issue you are dealing with and we will help.
sms.optOutMessage: You have been unsubscribed from {companyName} texts. Reply START to resubscribe.
sms.reviewRequest: Thanks again for choosing {companyName}. If we earned a 5-star experience, would you leave a quick Google review?
sms.acceptedFollowup: We'll contact you to schedule your service.
